title: Moonfrost
description:
WELCOME TO MOONFROST

Moonfrost is a life-sim RPG about rebuilding a broken world. Gather rare resources, collect crafting recipes, build and decorate your dream home, befriend and romance villagers as you restore their homes and uncover countless mysteries in this relaxing next-gen pixel art world.

BECOME A FROST HUNTER

One hundred years ago the world changed forever. A second moon appeared in our skies and rained chaos upon our homes.
We called these icy meteorites MOONFROST, and the First Frost Fall wasn’t the last.
In this ruined world, some of us learned to harness the power of this mysterious substance, creating order from the chaos.
They call us Frost Hunters, and we have a mission:
✨To rebuild the world, one shard at a time. ✨
This is Moonfrost, and your adventure is about to begin!

MYSTERY AND ROMANCE

Moonfrost tells the story of a broken world and the broken people who live within it. Form friendships and potential romances with a cast of deep, colourful characters, helping them face their fears and flaws as you unravel your own forgotten past and uncover the truth of Moonfrost and the ominous Second Moon that looms over us all.

BUILD YOUR DREAM HOME

Cottage, castle, or cozy villa! It’s all up to you! Use Build Mode to design, construct, and decorate your perfect home, wall by wall.
Bring life back to your village, cleaning the streets, restoring old buildings and designing unique homes for the other villagers!

A UNIQUE FARMING EXPERIENCE

Gather resources, grow crops and unlock a wealth of crafting recipes to personalise your character, build and decorate your dream home, and expand your abilities. As your world grows, so does the heartfelt story - rich with unforgettable characters and meaningful connections.

A LIVING BREATHING WORLD

Sit back, relax and lose yourself in a next-gen pixel art world featuring dynamic lighting, weather and wildlife systems as well as a haunting, original soundtrack.

COLLECT AND CRAFT

Unlock a growing collection of crafting recipes, from tools and decorations to outfits, hairstyles, and more. Mix and match gear to shape your own unique style, both in how you play and how you look.
